items.name: 砥山絵図面2枚付砥切道具一式
items.subcategory: 工芸品（村指定重要文化財・美術工芸品等）
items.location: 民俗資料館、自然史博物館保存／南牧村
items.description: 文化年間に作成された砥山採掘現場の説明図と砥切道具一式

en.name_romaji: Toyama ezumen nimai tsuki tokiri dogu isshiki
en.name_en: Two Quarry Maps of Toyama with a Set of Whetstone-Cutting Tools
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), two quarry maps of Toyama together with a set of whetstone-cutting tools. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important cultural property in the fine-arts and crafts category, designated on 1978-07-18. It is preserved at the folk museum and natural history museum in Nanmoku Village.

items.name: 黒滝山不動寺
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 延宝3年（1675年）湘音道海禅師が開山、黄檗宗黒滝派の本山

en.description_en: A monument (historic site), Kurotakisan Fudoji temple. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a historic site, designated on 1978-07-18. It is located at 1266 Oshiozawa-Ko.

items.name: 星尾の人形
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財（村指定重要（有形）民俗文化財）
items.location: 民俗資料館保存／星尾部落
items.description: 衣裳51点、カシラ41点、面2面。カシラは製作された当時のままで、古い江戸系カシラの典型的なもの

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the puppets of Hoshio. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important tangible folk cultural property, designated on 1978-07-18. It is preserved at the folk museum, from the Hoshio hamlet.

items.name: 大仁田神社の大杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 天然記念物（村指定天然記念物）
items.location: 大仁田小山沢1668／大仁田神社
items.description: 大正10年、市川別当次郎方が甲斐国により大仁田に転居した際に熊野神社を記り、その腹植された杉の1本。樹齢400年

en.description_en: A monument (natural monument), the great cedar of Onita Shrine. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a natural monument, designated on 1978-07-18. It is located at 1668 Onita-Koyamazawa, at Onita Shrine.

items.name: 蝉の渕付芭蕉塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 砥山字岩岱・笹原・甲斐無・河川帯／群馬県
items.description: 両側の岩山が急激に迫る渓谷、清流と樹林がよく調和している景勝地。渓谷にのぞんで芭蕉の句が刻まれた石にきざんである。

en.name_en: Semi Pool with the Basho Mound
en.description_en: A monument (place of scenic beauty), the Semi pool together with the Basho mound. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a place of scenic beauty, designated on 1978-07-18. It is located in the Toyama river zone (Iwadai, Sasahara, Kainashi districts).

items.name: 縁ケ滝
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 星尾川支流域一帯／群馬県
items.description: 星尾川の流れを切ってほぼ東西に走る断層線にそって形成された断層にかかる滝。滝の落差は約30m

en.description_en: A monument (place of scenic beauty), the Fuchigataki waterfall. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a place of scenic beauty, designated on 1978-07-18. It is located in the tributary area of the Hoshio River.

items.name: 天之岩戸神楽綺羅と面
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財（村指定重要（有形）民俗文化財）
items.description: 農耕神鹿屋野比売命を祭神とした岩戸神楽の衣裳

en.name_romaji: Ama no Iwato kagura kira to men
en.name_en: Costumes and Masks of the Ama-no-Iwato Kagura
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the costumes and masks of the Ama-no-Iwato kagura. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important tangible folk cultural property, designated on 1984-03-19. It is located at 999 Hizawa.

items.name: 石造双体道祖神
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財（村指定重要（有形）民俗文化財）
items.description: 小沢11年（1671年）に建立された村内で最も古い年号を持つ双体道祖神

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, a stone paired-figure dosojin (traveler's guardian deity). It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important tangible folk cultural property, designated on 1984-03-19. It is located at 999 Ozawa.

items.name: 桧沢神社本殿棟札5枚付
items.subcategory: 建造物（村指定重要文化財・建造物）
items.description: 三間社流造の本殿、享保7年（1722年）に建造と推定される

en.name_romaji: Hizawa Jinja honden munafuda gomai tsuki
en.name_en: Main Hall of Hizawa Shrine with Five Ridge Plaques
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (building), the main hall of Hizawa Shrine together with five ridge plaques (munafuda). It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important cultural property in the building category, designated on 1984-12-17. It is located at 651 Hizawa.

items.name: 石壁書天女窟
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 江戸時代の書家、東江源縁による石壁書「天女窟」小沢の「弁天柱」の背後の石壁に刻されている

en.description_en: A monument (historic site), the Tennyo cave bearing a rock-face inscription. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a historic site, designated on 1989-11-30. It is located at 1738-1 Ozawa-Otsu.

items.name: 砥山関係文書一括
items.subcategory: 工芸品（村指定重要文化財・美術工芸品等）
items.description: 上野御蔵院に関する古文書一括（冊18点、状物41点、計59点）

en.name_en: Collection of Documents Related to Toyama
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a collection of documents related to Toyama. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as an important cultural property in the fine-arts and crafts category, designated on 2004-02-24. It is located at 346 Toyama.

items.name: 市川五郎兵衛の墓碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 石材の正面に辞元院殿義鎮大徳霊位、左側面に仲河五郎兵衛親、右側面に寛文五歳己九月九日と印字されている。

en.description_en: A monument (historic site), the gravestone of Ichikawa Gorobei. It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a historic site, designated on 2004-02-24. It is located at 74 Hazawa.

items.name: 西方寺跡長二年銘宝篋印塔付応仁銘宝塔
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 正長二年（一四二九）と宝塔に年号や戒名が刻れており、この年代における石塔の形を知る貴重なものである。

en.name_romaji: Saihoji ato Chonen-mei Hokyoin-to tsuki Onin-mei hoto
en.name_en: Chonen-Era Hokyoin Pagoda at the Saihoji Site with an Onin-Era Treasure Pagoda
en.description_en: A monument (historic site), a Chonen-era Hokyoin pagoda at the Saihoji temple site together with an Onin-era treasure pagoda (hoto). It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a historic site, designated on 2004-02-24. It is located at 156 Oshiozawa.

items.name: 星尾風穴
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 蚕種を保存した室の屋根はなく、四方が幾分落下しているが、ほぼ原形を保持している。

en.description_en: A monument (historic site), the Hoshio wind cave (fuketsu). It is village-designated by Nanmoku Village as a historic site, designated on 2015-07-28. It is located at 430-2 Hoshio.
